title: 10 best herbal capsules for runny nose
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for runny nose are dietary supplements that contain a combination of natural herbs, which help alleviate symptoms of a runny nose. These herbs often include ingredients such as butterbur, boswellia, and bromelain, which have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. By reducing inflammation in the nasal passages, these herbal capsules can help relieve a runny nose, making it easier to breathe and improving overall quality of life. For example, a study published in the Journal of Ethnopharmacology found that butterbur extract was as effective as a popular antihistamine in treating allergic rhinitis, a common cause of a runny nose. Therefore, herbal capsules can provide a natural and effective alternative to traditional medications for managing runny nose symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsule helps with runny nose because it contains anti-inflammatory and astringent properties that can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages and narrow the blood vessels, thereby alleviating symptoms of a runny nose. Additionally, yarrow has been shown to have antimicrobial and antiviral effects, which may help the body fight off infections that can cause a runny nose. Its natural drying properties can also help to dry up excess mucus, providing relief from a stuffy or congested nose. Overall, yarrow capsules can be a natural and effective way to manage runny nose symptoms.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Yarrow capsules help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, which can alleviate a runny nose by limiting the body's response to irritants or allergens; this property is attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones.

Astringent: Yarrow capsules can constrict blood vessels and reduce mucus production, helping to control a runny nose; the astringent properties are primarily due to tannins and volatile oils found in yarrow.

Antimicrobial: Yarrow capsules may inhibit the growth of bacteria or viruses that can cause a runny nose; the antimicrobial activity is attributed to the presence of essential oils, particularly alpha-pinene and sabinene.

Immune-boosting: Yarrow capsules can help strengthen the immune system, which can help the body fight off infections that lead to a runny nose; this is primarily due to the presence of alkaloids, flavonoids, and polyacetylenes.

Antihistamine: Yarrow capsules can act as a natural antihistamine, helping to reduce the production of histamine, a compound that contributes to a runny nose; this property is attributed to the presence of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Yarrow flowers are often used in medicinal capsules for runny noses due to their anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help reduce nasal congestion and irritation.
Leaves: The leaves of the yarrow plant have been used in herbal medicine to treat runny noses because they contain volatile oils and flavonoids that have a decongestant effect.

Stems: Yarrow stems are sometimes included in medicinal capsules for runny noses as they contain similar beneficial compounds to the leaves and flowers, including sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory effects.
Seeds: Yarrow seeds are not commonly used in medicinal capsules for runny noses, but they do contain essential fatty acids that can help reduce inflammation in the body.
Roots: Yarrow roots are not typically used in medicinal capsules for runny noses, as they contain lower concentrations of the active compounds found in the above-ground parts of the plant.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Garlic capsule helps with runny nose because it contains allicin, a compound with natural decongestant and antimicrobial properties. This compound works by reducing inflammation and thinning the mucus in the nasal passages, making it easier to expel. Moreover, garlic has been shown to boost the immune system and help the body fight off viruses and bacteria, which can cause a runny nose. As a result, taking garlic capsules can provide relief from a runny nose and support overall respiratory health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Garlic capsules can help reduce inflammation in the nasal passages, providing relief from a runny nose, due to the presence of allicin, a sulfur-containing compound.
Antimicrobial: The antibacterial and antiviral properties of garlic capsules, attributed to allicin and ajoene, can help combat infections causing a runny nose.

Immune-boosting: Garlic capsules can enhance the immune system's response, allowing the body to better fight off the viruses and bacteria that cause a runny nose, thanks to the presence of allicin and various antioxidants.
Decongestant: Garlic capsules can help alleviate congestion by reducing the production of mucus and promoting sinus drainage, due to the presence of allicin and other volatile oils.

Antioxidant: Garlic capsules contain potent antioxidants, such as flavonoids and selenium, that can help protect the body from oxidative stress and support overall respiratory health during a runny nose.
remedy_parts: Bulbs: Garlic bulbs are often used to make medicinal capsules for runny nose due to their potent anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties.
Leaves: Garlic leaves have been shown to have decongestant properties, making them a useful addition to medicinal capsules for runny nose.
Flowers: Garlic flowers contain antioxidants that can help boost the immune system and reduce inflammation, making them a helpful ingredient in medicinal capsules for runny nose.
Seeds: Garlic seeds are rich in compounds that have been shown to have antimicrobial and expectorant properties, making them useful for treating runny noses.
Buds: Garlic buds are a concentrated source of allicin, a compound with potent anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them a popular choice for medicinal capsules for runny nose.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsule helps with runny nose because it contains a demulcent herb called Althaea officinalis, which has been used for centuries to soothe irritated mucous membranes. This herb creates a protective layer on the mucous membranes lining the respiratory tract, reducing inflammation and irritation. As a result, it helps to reduce the production of excess mucus, providing relief from a runny nose. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of marshmallow root may help alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds, further contributing to its effectiveness in managing a runny nose.

Demulcent: The demulcent properties of marshmallow extract soothe irritated mucous membranes, reducing the production of excess mucus in the nasal passages.
Expectorant: Marshmallow capsules help loosen and expel mucus from the respiratory tract, making it easier to expel mucus from the nose.
Antitussive: The antitussive properties of marshmallow capsules can help suppress a persistent cough, which often accompanies a runny nose.
Immune-boosting: Marshmallow capsules contain antioxidants that support the immune system, which can help the body fight off the viruses that cause runny noses.
remedy_parts: Flowers: Marshmallow flowers contain mucilage, which can help soothe a runny nose by reducing inflammation and providing a protective coating.
Leaves: Marshmallow leaves are rich in mucilage and flavonoids, making them effective in relieving symptoms of a runny nose by reducing irritation and providing a soothing effect.
Roots: The roots of marshmallow plants contain high amounts of mucilage and starch, which can help alleviate a runny nose by moisturizing and soothing the mucous membranes.
Seeds: Marshmallow seeds are a source of mucilage and pectin, which can help treat a runny nose by forming a protective film and reducing inflammation in the respiratory tract.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat runny nose with herbal capsules is by using those made from natural ingredients known to provide relief. These can include capsules with butterbur, eucalyptus, or menthol, which have anti-inflammatory and decongestant properties. Additionally, goldenseal and elderberry capsules can boost the immune system, helping to reduce inflammation and mucus production. Always consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to runny nose that are treated with herbal capsules include sinus congestion, allergies, and respiratory infections. Herbal remedies such as butterbur, goldenseal, and echinacea may be used to alleviate these symptoms. Butterbur has been shown to reduce inflammation and relieve sinus pressure, while goldenseal has antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Echinacea is commonly used to boost the immune system and fight off infections. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare professional before starting any new herbal supplement regimen.
